title: Arrival of Azur
summary: A Day after the Tribunal of Lieutenant Jones, rumors go around about a new spice strain called "Azur" which has gone viral across the galaxy, along with rumors of suspicious activity around Crucible Prime. Later that day, Four (4) Azur dealers arrive on the planet of Crucible Prime, with members of the Order trying the new spice, while one member of the Sphere of Laws and Justice quickly nearly overdoses on the substance and is brought into immediate medical care. The order murdered two of the dealers, with Darth Saevus making a discovery, while Darth Themis becomes addicted to the spice. The Order believes the Sphere handled this event poorly, and are worried about Spice Empires setting up buisness on the planet and other Sith Homeworlds.
